report_name: New 'Rex' Ransomware Emerges, Using Double Extortion and .rex48 Extension

threat_actors.name: Rex
threat_actors.description: A new ransomware-as-a-service (RaaS) operation that targets corporate Windows environments using double extortion tactics, including data exfiltration and encryption.
threat_actors.goals: Financial extortion of corporate victims through data encryption and threats of data leakage.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: Rex ransomware encrypts files on compromised Windows systems and appends the .rex48 extension, making them inaccessible to disrupt business operations.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol
attack_patterns.description: As part of its double extortion strategy, the Rex ransomware operation exfiltrates confidential data from victim networks before encryption and threatens to publish it.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: Rex ransomware attempts to delete Volume Shadow Copies using the vssadmin.exe command-line tool to hinder system recovery from encrypted files.

malware.name: Rex Ransomware
malware.description: A new ransomware strain that targets Windows environments, encrypts files with a .rex48 extension, exfiltrates data for double extortion, and deletes Volume Shadow Copies to prevent recovery.

tools.name: vssadmin
tools.description: Used by Rex ransomware to delete Volume Shadow Copies to inhibit system recovery.

infrastructure.name: Rex Ransomware Leak Site
infrastructure.description: A leak site used by the Rex ransomware group to publish stolen data from victims who do not pay the ransom.

infrastructure.name: Rex Ransomware Tor Chat Service
infrastructure.description: A Tor-based chat service used for victim communication and ransom negotiation.

indicators.name: Rex Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: Rex Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 2b8a7c1d-9f0e-4b6a-8c1d-9f0e4b6a8c1d
status: experimental
description: Detects the command-line used by Rex ransomware to delete Volume Shadow Copies.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/outofband/weekly-intelligence-report-15-may-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-15
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a technique used by Rex ransomware to inhibit system recovery.

indicators.name: Rex Ransomware Ransom Note
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Rex Ransomware Ransom Note Creation
id: 5e3c1a9b-8d7f-4c6a-9b1d-8d7f4c6a9b1d
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of the Rex ransomware ransom note 'RANSOM_NOTE.html'.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/outofband/weekly-intelligence-report-15-may-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-15
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '\RANSOM_NOTE.html'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of the HTML ransom note file named RANSOM_NOTE.html, which is dropped by Rex ransomware after encryption.

indicators.name: Rex Ransomware Encrypted File Extension
indicators.pattern:
title: Rex Ransomware Encrypted File Extension (.rex48)
id: 7d4f5b2a-1c9e-4a8b-9f0e-1c9e4a8b9f0e
status: experimental
description: Detects files being created or renamed with the .rex48 extension, characteristic of Rex ransomware.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/outofband/weekly-intelligence-report-15-may-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-15
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: medium
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.rex48'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of files with the .rex48 extension, which indicates that Rex ransomware is actively encrypting files on a system.

relationships.source_name: Rex Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
Rex Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
